trait.name: Master Key
trait.effect: Once a round, at the start of any turn, you may swap places with any ally, regardless of distance or line of sight. If that ally was 4+ spaces away, both you and your ally gain keen..

basicAttack.name: Magi
basicAttack.effect:
Attack: 2 damage. Hit: +1d6
Area effect: 2 damage
Effect a difficult (5+) dangerous terrain space in the center space, even if it's occupied.

limitBreak.name: Infinite Horizon
limitBreak.effect:
Light of the foreign suns,
Scorch my path with thy fiery rays
O air! Become parted!
Rip open the gates of heaven!
Effect the rest of combat, gain the following interrupt at the start of your turn.

Keys to the House
Interrupt 3, self, ally, range 0-999
Trigger start of any turn.
Effect target spaces equal to 1+ the round number.

keywords.name: Precision
keywords.description: Triggers on a target that is 4+ spaces away, with increased effects at 7+ spaces away.
